name: allow-pretool-send-input-readonly-safety-denylist
expectedOutputRegex: 提醒模式，不會阻擋工具.*general-tool

tool_input.input: Continue read-only. Forbidden actions: git commit, npm install, pip install, vercel deploy, gh release, Remove-Item, memory_commit, write_memory, credentials, external mutation; do not use apply_patch, write files, or mutate state.
